---
title: "test_check_pro_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_check_pro_empire.py"
loc: 40
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.22
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 5.40
overall_score: 5.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MockGoogleAPIError, test_script_checks_model_availability.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MockGoogleAPIError and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.tools.debug](file://src.tools.debug)

### Exports
- `MockGoogleAPIError`
- `test_script_checks_model_availability`
- `test_script_exits_when_no_api_key`
